violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Watched employee change tasks and put gloves on without washing hands.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Boxes of food in the main walk in freezer under the refrigeration unit have ice buildup on them. Open box of uncovered food in the back walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw hamburger patties sitting on eggs in the walk in cooler.--Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw brat patties in the back refrigerator above grapes.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates on the salad bar and on the cook line not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust buildup on the ceiling in the back food prep area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing in the back above single serve items exposing the attic.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in the walk in freezer on boxes of food.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dish washer was at 0 ppm. Facility was able to get it working.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates in the kitchen and on the salad bar are not inverted.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing exposing the attic.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided, maintained (3 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
